test_cases.title: Verify that a user can successfully log time with valid inputs
test_cases.evidence_quote: User can successfully log time with valid inputs
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Select a valid date within the current month
5. Choose a valid work log category from the dropdown
6. Select an active project from the dropdown
7. Enter hours greater than zero in the format 0h 0m
8. Provide a work description with at least 10 characters and no more than 500 characters
9. Click 'Submit' button
expected_result: The system should display a confirmation message indicating that the time log entry has been successfully submitted.

test_cases.title: Verify that invalid or missing inputs block submission
test_cases.evidence_quote: Invalid or missing inputs block submission.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Leave the date field empty
5. Choose a valid work log category from the dropdown
6. Select an active project from the dropdown
7. Enter hours greater than zero in the format 0h 0m
8. Provide a work description with less than 10 characters
9. Click 'Submit' button
expected_result: The system should display validation messages for both missing date and insufficient work description, blocking submission.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system allows selecting any previous date but not beyond the current month
test_cases.evidence_quote: The system must allow users to create daily time log entries and can select any previous date but not beyond the current month.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Select a date within the previous month
5. Choose a valid work log category from the dropdown
6. Select an active project from the dropdown
7. Enter hours greater than zero in the format 0h 0m
8. Provide a work description with at least 10 characters and no more than 500 characters
9. Click 'Submit' button
expected_result: The system should allow the user to select a date within the previous month and submit the time log entry successfully.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system allows submitting completed entries as Drafts
test_cases.evidence_quote: The system must allow submitting completed entries.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Select a valid date within the current month
5. Choose a valid work log category from the dropdown
6. Select an active project from the dropdown
7. Enter hours greater than zero in the format 0h 0m
8. Provide a work description with at least 10 characters and no more than 500 characters
9. Click 'Save as Draft' button
expected_result: The system should display a confirmation message indicating that the time log entry has been saved as a draft.

test_cases.title: Verify that archived projects are not selectable
test_cases.evidence_quote:
Exceptions
If project is archived, it must not be selectable
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Attempt to select an archived project from the dropdown
5. Enter hours greater than zero in the format 0h 0m
6. Provide a work description with at least 10 characters and no more than 500 characters
7. Click 'Submit' button
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that archived projects cannot be selected, blocking submission.

test_cases.title: Ensure that the system displays an error message when a user tries to log time with a future date
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Select a future date in the date picker
5. Enter valid values for other required fields
6. Attempt to save the entry
expected_result: The system should display an error message: 'Please enter a valid date'

test_cases.title: Validate that the system allows selecting projects from both Brac and BracIT Jira
test_cases.evidence_quote: Project will be searchable from both Brac and BracIT jira
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Search for a project in both Brac and BracIT Jira
expected_result: The system should display projects from both Brac and BracIT Jira

test_cases.title: Ensure that the system displays an error message when a user tries to log time without selecting a project
test_cases.evidence_quote: Must select one project from the list (Project category same as project creation process)
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Do not select any project in the projects dropdown
5. Enter valid values for other required fields
6. Attempt to save the entry
expected_result: The system should display an error message: 'Please select a project'

test_cases.title: Validate that the system displays an error message when a user tries to log time with a work description less than 10 characters
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Navigate to the role-based home screen
3. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
4. Enter a work description with less than 10 characters
5. Enter valid values for other required fields
6. Attempt to save the entry
expected_result: The system should display an error message: 'Minimum 10 characters required'
